title: Velvety Spanish Almond Fritters
description: Quick, yeasty, velvety fritters made with almond flour and a hint of lemon, perfect for a Buddhist‑temple‑friendly dessert.
instructions: In a bowl, whisk together almond flour, baking powder, yeast, salt, and sugar.
Combine warm almond milk and water; let it sit for 5 minutes until frothy.
Pour the liquid into dry mix, add vanilla, lemon zest, and stir until smooth batter forms.
Let batter rest for 10 minutes to develop lift.
Heat a nonstick skillet over medium heat and drizzle with olive oil.
Spoon tablespoonfuls of batter into skillet, flatten slightly, and cook 2-3 minutes per side.
Flip carefully and cook until golden and puffed.
Transfer fritters to a paper‑towel lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve warm, optionally dusted with powdered sugar or paired with fresh fruit.
